name: Egg Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, lightly beat the eggs with a pinch of salt and a few pieces of scallion.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a preheated wok.
3. Lightly scramble the eggs in the hot oil.
4. Add the cooked rice to the wok and stir until each grain is separated.
5. Add the remaining salt, chopped scallions, and green peas.
6. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
7. Serve the fried rice.
